text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Look at this! I got a package today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap passes over a red scarf of the same
color as her signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I notice that people have written messages of
support for her on the underside of the
scarf—where nobody else would be able to see
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reminded of how loved she is, I return the scarf
to her.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. Everyone wrote me a little something.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There are messages like, "We're always by your
side," "We're running with you," and "You're the
embodiment of our dreams."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The embodiment of their dreams? I'm not sure
what they mean by that.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I know that seeing me race makes them happy... But how can I be their dream?
choice_data_list: They're pinning their hopes on you.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Their hopes? On me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to Oguri Cap that she represents the
aspirations, hopes, and wishes of the people back
home.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sounds complicated, but I think I sort of get it
now... Everyone's cheering me on and wishing me
the best.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...That makes me feel all warm inside—like I'm not
alone.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, I guess I do. But at the same time, I feel
like that's what pushes me forward.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure if "pressure" is the right word
though... I think it's more like... encouragement?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...I'm getting an overwhelming urge to run. Will
you come with me?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I decide to stay with Oguri Cap until she feels
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I was a little skeptical about this outfit at first. I
kept wondering why you wanted me to wear it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I get it now. People recognize it as my
signature racewear. That's why everybody from
back home sent me this scarf.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
They really want me to win... And this outfit
represents those feelings.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I... feel the same way. I really want to win.
choice_data_list: We're on the same page there!
We're on the same page there!
Let's aim to win—for everyone's sake!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I... feel the same way. I really want to win.
choice_data_list: We're on the same page there!
We're on the same page there!
Let's aim to win—for everyone's sake!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know you're always by my side,
supporting me.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'll keep running—for the both of us!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: As long as you're with me, I can't lose!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Everyone's hopes and dreams rest on
my shoulders.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Oguri Cap brimming with resolve, I feel a
renewed sense of determination for the next race.
